raw_consumer_statement:
BY XXXX XXXX I VERIFIED IN MY ACCOUNT A TRANSACTION OF A PURCHASE OF XXXX IN MY ACCOUNT IN A XXXX XXXX BY A PERSON NAMED XXXX, I IMMEDIATELY CALLED AMERICAN EXPRESS AND TOLD HER THAT I DO NOT AUTHORIZE ANYONE TO MAKE ANY PURCHASE FROM MY CREDIT CARD THAT THAT TRANSACTION WAS FRAUDULENT, THEY INFORMED ME THAT SHE WAS AUTHORIZED ON THE ACCOUNT AND THAT THEY HAD SENT A CARD TO HER ADDRESS DIRECTLY, A SENDING THAT WAS MADE WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE OR AUTHORIZATION, VIOLATING MY CONSUMER RIGHTS AMERICAN EXPRESS, GIVING ACCESS TO MY ACCOUNT TO A PERSON I DO NOT KNOW. 
THEY TOLD ME THAT THEY COULD NOT STOP THE TRANSACTION. JUST 1 HOUR AFTER THE TRANSACTION AND TRANSFERRING ME TO THE FRAUD DEPARTMENT, THEY CREATED A REPORT WHERE I HAVE PROOF THAT AFTER THE INVESTIGATION THEY SENT ME THE EMAIL THAT THE PURCHASE CHARGE WAS GOING TO BE RETURNED TO MY ACCOUNT IN THE NEXT BANK STATEMENT, THAT BALANCE WAS NEVER REFLECTED BACKWARDS AND NOW THEY TELL ME THAT I MUST PAY THEM unfairly, PLEASE HELP ATTACH THE EVIDENCE WHERE THEY AFTER THE INVESTIGATION AND THE ERRORS THEY MADE SAID THAT THEY WERE GOING TO RETURN THE BALANCE TO ME IN THE NEW BANK STATEMENT AND IT WAS NOT SO, I FEEL DECEIVED AND FRUSTRATED BY A SITUATION WHERE AMERICAN EXPRESS IS RESPONSIBLE, BECAUSE THE CHARGE WAS IMMEDIATELY MADE I CALLED AT ONCE AND THEY DID NOT WANT TO RETURN THE PAYMENT. EVEN SO THEY DO THE INVESTIGATION AND THEN THEY TELL ME THAT THE MONEY WILL BE REPLACED IN MY ACCOUNT AND IN THE NEXT BANK STATEMENT AND THEY DID NOT DO IT. ATTACH IS ALL THE EVIDENCE OF MY CONVERSATION WITH THEM AND THE RESOLUTION OF THE INVESTIGATION. I JUST WANT TO NOT HAVE LATE PAYMENT REFLECTED IN MY PAYMENT HISTORY, MUCH LESS TO HAVE A DUE BALANCE. ATTACH MY FTC REPORT AND COMPLAINT TO AMERICAN EXPRESS
